name: Asparagus with Water Chestnuts
recipeIngredient: 1 Can water chestnuts (8 oz.), drained and sliced
7 Cups fresh asparagus, cut into 1-inch diagonal pieces (2 lb. spears)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the margarine, salt, and pepper in a 2-quart casserole.
2. Add the asparagus and cover tightly.
3. Microwave on High (100%) for 7 minutes.
4. Stir in the water chestnuts.
5. Microwave uncovered until the asparagus is crisp-tender, about 5 to 7 more minutes.
6. Makes 5 servings.
Note: If the asparagus stands covered before serving, it will be very tender instead of crisp-tender.
